'''zhachotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wwoofer|wwoofer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ch-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wwoofer|wwoofer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhachotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæchetheth|zhæchetheth]] || [[word:zhæchethej|zhæchethej]] || [[word:zhæchethesh|zhæchethesh]] || [[word:zhæchethe|zhæchethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhachochothoth|zhachochothoth]] || [[word:zhachochothoj|zhachochothoj]] || [[word:zhachochothosh|zhachochothosh]] || [[word:zhachochotho|zhachochotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhachothoth|zhachothoth]] || [[word:zhachothoj|zhachothoj]] || [[word:zhachothosh|zhachothosh]] || [[word:zhachotho|zhachotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhachofthoth|zhachofthoth]] || [[word:zhachofthoj|zhachofthoj]] || [[word:zhachofthosh|zhachofthosh]] || [[word:zhachofthof|zhachofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhachothotho|zhachothotho]] || [[word:zhachothojo|zhachothojo]] || [[word:zhachothosho|zhachothosho]] || [[word:zhachothoko|zhachothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhachothoth|zhachothoth]] || [[word:zhachothoj|zhachothoj]] || [[word:zhachothosh|zhachothosh]] || [[word:zhachotho|zhachotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhachothothol|zhachothothol]] || [[word:zhachothojol|zhachothojol]] || [[word:zhachothoshol|zhachothoshol]] || [[word:zhachothokol|zhachothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhachothothotho|zhachothothotho]] || [[word:zhachothojojo|zhachothojojo]] || [[word:zhachothoshosho|zhachothoshosho]] || [[word:zhachothoko|zhachothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhachothothon|zhachothothon]] || [[word:zhachothojon|zhachothojon]] || [[word:zhachothoshon|zhachothoshon]] || [[word:zhachothokon|zhachothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhachothothoro|zhachothothoro]] || [[word:zhachothojoro|zhachothojoro]] || [[word:zhachothoshoro|zhachothoshoro]] || [[word:zhachothokoro|zhachothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
